Motion To Dismiss And Compel Private Arbitration

MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Defendant MELONDY JONES (Tel: 510-290-1784) in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT MELONDY JONES' Motion To Dismiss And Compel Private Arbitration.

The Court orients the defendant as to the Court's tentative ruling. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant Melondy Jones' "motion to dismiss and compel private arbitration" is off calendar. Defendant did not serve and file the motion at least 16 court days before the date set for the hearing, as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b).

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, Email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com. (302/EPS)
